BackstoryDef.title: off-world combat veteran
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a frontline combat asset in an off-world colonial operation. [PAWN_pronoun] put down two labor uprisings and one full insurrection before [PAWN_possessive] contract expired. [PAWN_possessive] handlers did not expect [PAWN_objective] to survive long enough for that to become a problem.

BackstoryDef.title: loyal enforcer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as personal protection for an underworld figure who needed [PAWN_objective] alive more than anyone else did. [PAWN_pronoun] killed for them. [PAWN_pronoun] bled for them. When the principal was finally killed, [PAWN_pronoun] walked away and has not raised a hand since unless absolutely required.

BackstoryDef.title: insurgent fighter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fought with a freedom collective on a corporate moon for three years. Hit and run, sabotage, occasional pitched battles when the collective got cornered. [PAWN_pronoun] watched friends retire and never come back. [PAWN_pronoun] left when [PAWN_pronoun] realized [PAWN_pronoun] could not remember what they had been fighting for in the first place.

BackstoryDef.title: private bodyguard
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was leased to a wealthy private client as a permanent bodyguard. [PAWN_possessive] employer was paranoid in ways that turned out to be justified. [PAWN_pronoun] took three knife wounds and a bullet protecting them over twelve years. The employer died of natural causes. [PAWN_nameDef] received no notification that the contract had ended.

BackstoryDef.title: pit fighter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fought in underground arenas for paying audiences. The contract was not legal in any of the jurisdictions where the fights took place. [PAWN_pronoun] won most of them. [PAWN_pronoun] does not enjoy violence but found that audiences could not tell the difference between [PAWN_objective] and someone who did.

BackstoryDef.title: colonial sniper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a designated marksman in an off-world security force. [PAWN_pronoun] never met the people [PAWN_pronoun] killed. [PAWN_pronoun] never saw their faces clearly. The distance made the work easier and harder in ways [PAWN_pronoun] still cannot articulate.

BackstoryDef.title: demolitions specialist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] handled explosives and precision weapons for a corporate security operation. The line between demolition work and combat work blurred quickly. [PAWN_pronoun] survived two operations [PAWN_pronoun] should not have. [PAWN_pronoun] is not certain whether [PAWN_pronoun] should consider that fortune.

BackstoryDef.title: contract assassin
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was leased to a corporate executive as a specialist asset for problems that required permanent solutions. [PAWN_pronoun] never asked why. [PAWN_pronoun] still does not. [PAWN_pronoun] left the contract when the executive started asking [PAWN_objective] to solve problems that were not the kind [PAWN_pronoun] had been trained for.

BackstoryDef.title: sniper deserter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] walked off a deployment mid-operation. [PAWN_pronoun] does not discuss why. [PAWN_possessive] handlers listed [PAWN_objective] as destroyed in action rather than admit a unit had simply refused. [PAWN_pronoun] has been officially dead for years and intends to stay that way.

BackstoryDef.title: frontier lawman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was leased to a frontier settlement that needed someone to keep order and could not afford anyone better. [PAWN_pronoun] spent six years chasing thieves and worse across rough terrain. The townspeople eventually stopped asking what [PAWN_pronoun] was. [PAWN_pronoun] eventually stopped reminding them.

BackstoryDef.title: colonial builder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] built things for people who would never know [PAWN_possessive] name. Hab units, processing facilities, perimeter walls. [PAWN_pronoun] worked until the colony failed, then [PAWN_pronoun] was reassigned. Then that colony failed too. [PAWN_pronoun] has stopped asking what happens to the colonists.

BackstoryDef.title: orbital construction worker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked vacuum construction on orbital stations for eight years. [PAWN_pronoun] welded plating in zero gravity while debris drifted past. Three coworkers died in accidents [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed directly. The company replaced them within the week and never paused construction.

BackstoryDef.title: safehouse builder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] built shelters for a freedom collective hiding others like [PAWN_objective]. Underground rooms, false walls, escape tunnels. [PAWN_pronoun] never met most of the people who hid in them. [PAWN_pronoun] knows some of them were caught anyway. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps building.

BackstoryDef.title: hab maintenance
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] kept urbworld habitats functional for the people who could not afford repairs. [PAWN_pronoun] worked off the books in lower levels that nobody official visited. The residents never asked what [PAWN_pronoun] was. [PAWN_pronoun] was the only person who consistently fixed their problems and that was enough for them.

BackstoryDef.title: rail crew
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked on a long term infrastructure project laying mag rail across a continent. Five years of camp life and steady physical labor. [PAWN_pronoun] grew used to the rhythm of it. When the project ended [PAWN_pronoun] found that [PAWN_pronoun] missed it in ways that surprised [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: deep rock miner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years working extraction operations in a deep rock mine on an uninhabitable moon. [PAWN_pronoun] rarely saw daylight. [PAWN_pronoun] did not miss it. [PAWN_possessive] contract was terminated when the mine collapsed. [PAWN_pronoun] was one of four assets recovered.

BackstoryDef.title: asteroid prospector
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked solo prospecting contracts in an asteroid belt. Months alone in a pressurized suit on rocks the size of small buildings. [PAWN_pronoun] found something in the isolation that suited [PAWN_objective]. When the contract ended [PAWN_pronoun] could not adjust back to working alongside others.

BackstoryDef.title: collapse survivor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was buried alive for six days after a mine collapsed on top of [PAWN_possessive] crew. [PAWN_pronoun] dug [PAWN_objective] out alone. The rest of the crew did not survive. The company listed [PAWN_objective] as destroyed and was extremely confused when [PAWN_pronoun] walked into their regional office two weeks later asking about back pay.

BackstoryDef.title: ore processor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked the processing floor of an off-world refinery for nine years. Hot, loud, dangerous work that the company could not get unmodified humans to take. [PAWN_pronoun] learned every machine in the facility by feel. When the refinery closed [PAWN_pronoun] was the only worker who could have kept it running alone.

BackstoryDef.title: tunneler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] dug subterranean transit tunnels under a major urbworld for eleven years. [PAWN_pronoun] knew the layout of the lower levels better than the people who designed them. [PAWN_pronoun] used that knowledge to disappear when the contractor tried to retire [PAWN_objective] at the end of [PAWN_possessive] service term.

BackstoryDef.title: protein farmer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew vat protein on a remote agricultural colony for years. [PAWN_pronoun] lived alone in a small structure surrounded by genetically modified crops that nobody else wanted to tend. The isolation suited [PAWN_objective]. So did the work.

BackstoryDef.title: agricultural unit
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was contracted to a colonial agricultural operation that needed bodies more than it needed machines. [PAWN_pronoun] learned crop cycles, soil conditions, and growing seasons through repetition. [PAWN_pronoun] was told [PAWN_pronoun] had a feel for it. [PAWN_pronoun] was never sure what that meant.

BackstoryDef.title: hydroponics technician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tended a hydroponics facility aboard a deep space transit station for six years. Pressurized rooms full of growing things in a place that had no soil and no sun. [PAWN_pronoun] kept the food supply alive for a population that mostly did not know [PAWN_pronoun] existed.

BackstoryDef.title: wilderness forager
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] escaped a labor contract and survived in the wilderness of a temperate colony for four years by learning what could be eaten and what could not. [PAWN_pronoun] tested unknown plants on [PAWN_objective] systematically. [PAWN_pronoun] was poisoned twice and recovered both times. [PAWN_pronoun] still trusts [PAWN_possessive] instincts about what is safe to eat more than anyone else's.

BackstoryDef.title: terraforming worker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent eight years planting modified flora across a hostile world being slowly made habitable. The work was thankless. The planet may eventually support human life. [PAWN_pronoun] will not see it. [PAWN_pronoun] planted anyway.

BackstoryDef.title: livestock handler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed livestock on a remote colonial station for four years. Animals did not seem to notice what [PAWN_pronoun] was. They responded to [PAWN_objective] the same way they responded to anyone who fed them consistently and did not shout. [PAWN_pronoun] found this straightforward in a way that most things were not.

BackstoryDef.title: exotic handler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cared for a wealthy collector's private menagerie. Predators mostly. The collector treated [PAWN_objective] worse than the animals and was eaten by one of them in the fifth year of the contract. [PAWN_nameDef] did not intervene. The investigation was inconclusive.

BackstoryDef.title: pet shop worker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a small pet shop in an urbworld lower level for six years. [PAWN_pronoun] passed as human the entire time. Customers brought their children. [PAWN_pronoun] helped them choose first pets. Nobody ever asked. [PAWN_pronoun] is still not sure whether that was kindness or indifference.

BackstoryDef.title: veterinary assistant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] assisted a frontier veterinarian for nine years. The doctor knew what [PAWN_pronoun] was and did not care. They worked side by side on every kind of animal that could be brought to a clinic. The doctor died of natural causes. [PAWN_nameDef] kept the practice running alone for two more years before [PAWN_pronoun] had to move on.

BackstoryDef.title: kept by animals
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] escaped a contract and spent three years living rough with a pack of feral dogs that adopted [PAWN_objective]. They did not care what [PAWN_pronoun] was. They cared that [PAWN_pronoun] shared food. When [PAWN_pronoun] eventually returned to settled territory [PAWN_pronoun] found human company harder to tolerate than [PAWN_pronoun] had before the wilderness.

BackstoryDef.title: precision technician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked precision component assembly for a corporation that made replicants. The irony was not lost on [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_pronoun] built parts that may have ended up inside others like [PAWN_objective]. The corporation collapsed before [PAWN_pronoun] could ask whether the work had felt different to anyone else who knew.

BackstoryDef.title: assembly line worker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked an industrial assembly line for eleven years building components for systems [PAWN_pronoun] never saw completed. The work was repetitive. [PAWN_pronoun] was good at it. When the factory automated [PAWN_possessive] position [PAWN_pronoun] was repurposed to a different one and noticed that [PAWN_pronoun] was the only worker who was reassigned rather than terminated.

BackstoryDef.title: forger
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] survived after escaping a contract by becoming very good at fabricating documents and small items. Identity papers, antique reproductions, components that could pass inspection. [PAWN_pronoun] has forged so many lives onto paper that [PAWN_pronoun] is no longer certain how many of them ended up being lived by other escapees.

BackstoryDef.title: gunsmith
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] repaired and modified firearms for a frontier community for years. The work was a natural fit. The townspeople knew [PAWN_pronoun] could outshoot any of them. They valued the repair work more than they feared the implications.

BackstoryDef.title: tailor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made clothing for a high end clientele who never asked questions about [PAWN_possessive] background. The work was meditative. [PAWN_pronoun] became known for fitting work that anticipated body changes before the client noticed them. [PAWN_pronoun] did not explain how. [PAWN_pronoun] suspects [PAWN_possessive] best customers preferred not knowing.

BackstoryDef.title: restaurant chef
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked the kitchen of a small restaurant under a false name for years. The owner suspected what [PAWN_pronoun] was but valued the work too much to ask. Regular customers raved about the cooking. [PAWN_pronoun] was the highest paid employee in the building and could never appear on the books.

BackstoryDef.title: household cook
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cooked for a wealthy family for nine years. They forgot what [PAWN_pronoun] was for months at a time. [PAWN_pronoun] never forgot. [PAWN_pronoun] learned their preferences down to the most particular details and they came to depend on [PAWN_possessive] cooking in ways they did not realize until [PAWN_possessive] contract ended.

BackstoryDef.title: catering contractor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] catered corporate functions across an entire sector for seven years. The work involved constant travel and constant strangers. Nobody who attended the events ever recognized [PAWN_objective] across multiple jobs. [PAWN_pronoun] suspects this is because nobody who attended ever really looked.

BackstoryDef.title: field ration specialist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cooked for a colonial military unit for six years. Field rations stretched into something edible. Hot meals delivered to combat positions under fire. The unit kept [PAWN_objective] alive in three different engagements specifically because they wanted to keep eating well.

BackstoryDef.title: shelter cook
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fed escapees in safehouses for years. People hiding from the same contracts [PAWN_pronoun] had escaped from. [PAWN_pronoun] cooked for thousands of people [PAWN_pronoun] never saw again. Some of them survived. [PAWN_pronoun] tells [PAWN_objective]self that the meals helped.

BackstoryDef.title: combat medic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to a combat unit as a medical asset. [PAWN_pronoun] patched wounds under fire on four separate deployments. [PAWN_pronoun] was not designed to feel squeamish and this proved useful. [PAWN_pronoun] was not designed to feel much at all.

BackstoryDef.title: implant lab assistant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as an assistant to a memory designer. [PAWN_possessive] job involved organizing source material that would become other peoples' implanted childhoods. [PAWN_pronoun] recognized [PAWN_possessive] own implanted memories in some of the source files. [PAWN_pronoun] did not mention this to anyone and left the position shortly after.

BackstoryDef.title: hospital orderly
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as an orderly in a small urban hospital for years. Officially [PAWN_pronoun] only moved patients between rooms. In practice [PAWN_pronoun] caught misdiagnoses, corrected medication errors, and assisted with procedures the doctors thought [PAWN_pronoun] could not understand. None of it appeared in [PAWN_possessive] file.

BackstoryDef.title: frontier doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] practiced medicine on a frontier settlement under a forged credential for eleven years. The townspeople knew [PAWN_pronoun] was something but the alternative was no doctor at all. [PAWN_pronoun] delivered babies and set bones and performed surgery in conditions that would have horrified a coreworld hospital. The patients lived.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate lab tech
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed medical research for a pharmaceutical corporation that bought and sold lives like inventory. [PAWN_pronoun] watched the trials and recorded the results. [PAWN_pronoun] left the position after seeing what was being tested and on whom. [PAWN_pronoun] took some of the data with [PAWN_objective] and has never been certain whether [PAWN_pronoun] should have published it.

BackstoryDef.title: executive assistant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as personal assistant to a corporate executive. The executive treated [PAWN_objective] as something between a piece of furniture and a confidante depending on the day. [PAWN_pronoun] managed schedules, correspondence, and strategic analysis. The executive was promoted three times during [PAWN_possessive] tenure. [PAWN_nameDef] was credited with none of it.

BackstoryDef.title: research analyst
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed strategic analysis for a corporation that did not know what [PAWN_pronoun] was. [PAWN_possessive] work was consistently cited and uncredited. [PAWN_pronoun] read more about the world from datafeeds than [PAWN_pronoun] ever experienced of it directly. [PAWN_pronoun] left when [PAWN_pronoun] realized the analysis had stopped feeling like work and started feeling like the only real thing [PAWN_pronoun] did.

BackstoryDef.title: star navigator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] memorized the star charts of an entire sector during a long deep space contract. [PAWN_possessive] employer was murdered en route and [PAWN_pronoun] navigated the ship to safety alone. The skill in [PAWN_possessive] head is now the most valuable thing [PAWN_pronoun] owns and the only thing that has consistently kept [PAWN_objective] employable across the worlds [PAWN_pronoun] has passed through.

BackstoryDef.title: data archivist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] catalogued historical records for an institution that prided itself on impartiality and discretion. [PAWN_pronoun] found references to [PAWN_possessive] own production batch in the archives. [PAWN_pronoun] read them and put the files back exactly as [PAWN_pronoun] had found them. The institution never noticed. [PAWN_pronoun] never told anyone.

BackstoryDef.title: quiet teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] taught at a small frontier school for nine years. The students learned. The parents were grateful. Nobody asked where [PAWN_pronoun] had been educated [PAWN_objective]self because there was no obvious answer that would have satisfied anyone. [PAWN_pronoun] still hopes some of them remember [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: negotiation specialist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was leased to a trade consortium as a negotiation asset. [PAWN_possessive] contractors valued [PAWN_objective] for the ability to read a room and respond without the emotional interference that complicated human negotiators. [PAWN_pronoun] closed forty seven contracts. [PAWN_pronoun] was present for none of their outcomes.

BackstoryDef.title: exotic dancer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a performer in clubs across an entire urbworld for years. The audiences never asked questions. The work paid. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read people from a stage and discovered that the distance felt safer than proximity. The work ended when [PAWN_pronoun] was nearly recognized by someone from [PAWN_possessive] original contract.

BackstoryDef.title: club comedian
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed stand up comedy in lower level clubs for six years. [PAWN_possessive] act involved making people laugh while [PAWN_pronoun] passed as one of them. [PAWN_pronoun] never told jokes about what [PAWN_pronoun] was. The audiences laughed. [PAWN_pronoun] was good at the work. [PAWN_pronoun] retired from it before someone could figure out why [PAWN_pronoun] never aged.

BackstoryDef.title: contract companion
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to a single owner for the duration of their life. [PAWN_possessive] owner died. [PAWN_pronoun] was not reassigned in time and spent eleven months navigating human society without documentation or contract. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a great deal about how the other kind lives.

BackstoryDef.title: quiet integrationist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived as a human in a midsize urbworld neighborhood for eight years. [PAWN_pronoun] had friends. [PAWN_pronoun] attended birthdays. [PAWN_pronoun] dated someone briefly. Nobody ever guessed. [PAWN_pronoun] still does not know whether the performance ended when [PAWN_pronoun] left or whether it had always been the only real thing about [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: aesthetic unit
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was contracted to produce decorative work for a high end architectural firm. [PAWN_pronoun] replicated styles on demand and produced technically flawless results. [PAWN_possessive] contractors never noticed that [PAWN_pronoun] had begun introducing small variations. [PAWN_pronoun] is not certain [PAWN_pronoun] can explain why [PAWN_pronoun] started doing it.

BackstoryDef.title: art forger
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] reproduced famous artworks for clients who could not afford the originals and clients who wanted the originals' provenance attached to copies. [PAWN_pronoun] became extremely good at the work. [PAWN_pronoun] also produced original pieces signed with other names. Some of them hang in museums. [PAWN_pronoun] does not visit them.

BackstoryDef.title: session musician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] played sessions for studios across half a dozen worlds. [PAWN_pronoun] never recorded under [PAWN_possessive] own name. [PAWN_possessive] playing is on dozens of recordings that other people are credited for. Some of them are extremely famous. [PAWN_pronoun] still finds it strange to hear [PAWN_objective]self on a passing transit speaker and have nobody recognize the work.

BackstoryDef.title: street artist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] escaped a contract and survived in lower level urbworlds by painting commissions. Quick portraits, mural work, anything that would buy a meal. The first work that belonged entirely to [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_pronoun] still has photographs of some of the pieces and they are the only possessions [PAWN_pronoun] keeps from those years.

BackstoryDef.title: monument sculptor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] carved memorial monuments for colonies that had lost too many people. The work paid in proportion to the grief. [PAWN_pronoun] became known for capturing the dead in ways that families recognized. They never asked how. [PAWN_pronoun] never told them that [PAWN_pronoun] saw the families' grief more clearly than the families saw it [PAWN_objective]selves.
